name: MiqorAI
description: MiqorAI monorepo — run all web frontends together

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n patient,hospital,insurance,pharmacy,admin -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan "npm run dev --prefix patient-portal-desktop" "npm run dev --prefix hospital-portal" "npm run dev --prefix insurance-portal" "npm run dev --prefix pharmacy-portal" "npm run dev --prefix admin-portal"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix patient-portal-desktop && npm install --prefix hospital-portal && npm install --prefix insurance-portal && npm install --prefix pharmacy-portal && npm install --prefix admin-portal
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix patient-portal-desktop && npm run build --prefix hospital-portal && npm run build --prefix insurance-portal && npm run build --prefix pharmacy-portal && npm run build --prefix admin-portal
